caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, tan suspenders, a small red bow tie, and glasses. He wears a grey, peaked wig that stands upright and black over-ear headphones. In front of him is a professional black microphone on a boom arm. The background consists of a white wall decorated with several framed photographs and a clothing rack with white garments and a yellow "LEE" sign. A logo featuring a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" appears in the bottom corners of the frames. As the scene progresses, the man's facial expression shifts from a neutral look to a slight smile and then to a broader grin, suggesting he is reacting to something during a conversation. The camera remains stationary, focusing on the man from the chest up.
